CustomField.formula: IF( OR( AND( OR(LastModifiedDate > awsapn__Last_APN_Sync_Date__c,LastModifiedDate = awsapn__Last_APN_Sync_Date__c), awsapn__Sync_with_Partner_Central__c, NOT(ISNULL(awsapn__Last_APN_Sync_Date__c)) ), AND(ISNULL(awsapn__Last_APN_Sync_Date__c),awsapn__Sync_with_Partner_Central__c) ) , true , false )
CustomField.label: Has updates for AWS
